title: 過去式 was / were 與 did 問句辨別 50 題

questions.prompt: She ____ tired yesterday.
questions.explanation: She 是單數，過去式 be 動詞要用 was。

questions.prompt: They ____ at the park last Sunday.
questions.explanation: They 是複數，過去式 be 動詞要用 were。

questions.prompt: ____ you at home last night?
questions.explanation: at home 表示狀態或位置，要用 be 動詞問句；you 搭配 were。

questions.prompt: ____ Tom play basketball yesterday?
questions.explanation: play 是動作動詞，過去式問句要用 Did。

questions.prompt: My brother ____ not sick last week.
questions.explanation: My brother 是單數，過去式 be 動詞否定句用 was not。

questions.prompt: We ____ late for class this morning.
questions.explanation: We 是複數，過去式 be 動詞要用 were。

questions.prompt: ____ Mary happy after the test?
questions.explanation: happy 是狀態，不是動作動詞；Mary 是單數，所以用 Was。

questions.prompt: ____ they eat lunch at school yesterday?
questions.explanation: eat 是動作動詞，過去式問句要用 Did。

questions.prompt: I ____ in Taipei last weekend.
questions.explanation: I 的過去式 be 動詞要用 was。

questions.prompt: The students ____ not noisy yesterday.
questions.explanation: The students 是複數，過去式 be 動詞否定句用 were not。

questions.prompt: ____ your father drive to work yesterday?
questions.explanation: drive 是動作動詞，過去式問句用 Did。

questions.prompt: ____ your parents at home last night?
questions.explanation: your parents 是複數，而且 at home 是狀態或位置，所以用 Were。

questions.prompt: The movie ____ very interesting.
questions.explanation: The movie 是單數，過去式 be 動詞用 was。

questions.prompt: He ____ do his homework last night.
questions.explanation: do his homework 是動作，過去式否定句要用 didn't 加原形動詞。

questions.prompt: ____ the weather cold yesterday?
questions.explanation: cold 是狀態，the weather 是單數，所以用 Was。

questions.prompt: My friends ____ not in the classroom.
questions.explanation: My friends 是複數，過去式 be 動詞否定句用 were not。

questions.prompt: ____ you finish your work yesterday?
questions.explanation: finish 是動作動詞，過去式問句要用 Did。

questions.prompt: Jack and Peter ____ at the library after school.
questions.explanation: Jack and Peter 是兩個人，過去式 be 動詞用 were。

questions.prompt: ____ Lisa study English last night?
questions.explanation: study 是動作動詞，過去式問句用 Did。

questions.prompt: Lisa ____ busy yesterday afternoon.
questions.explanation: Lisa 是單數，過去式 be 動詞用 was。

questions.prompt: The baby ____ not hungry at noon.
questions.explanation: The baby 是單數，過去式 be 動詞否定句用 was not。

questions.prompt: ____ the boys play soccer yesterday?
questions.explanation: play 是動作動詞，過去式問句要用 Did。

questions.prompt: ____ the boys tired after the game?
questions.explanation: tired 是狀態，the boys 是複數，所以用 Were。

questions.prompt: I ____ not late this morning.
questions.explanation: I 的過去式 be 動詞否定句用 was not。

questions.prompt: ____ your sister clean her room yesterday?
questions.explanation: clean 是動作動詞，過去式問句用 Did。

questions.prompt: ____ your sister at school yesterday?
questions.explanation: at school 是位置狀態，your sister 是單數，所以用 Was。

questions.prompt: The books ____ on the desk yesterday.
questions.explanation: The books 是複數，過去式 be 動詞用 were。

questions.prompt: She ____ watch TV last night.
questions.explanation: watch 是動作動詞，過去式否定句要用 didn't。

questions.prompt: ____ he sad yesterday?
questions.explanation: sad 是狀態，he 是單數，所以用 Was。

questions.prompt: ____ he call you yesterday?
questions.explanation: call 是動作動詞，過去式問句要用 Did。

questions.prompt: The classroom ____ clean this morning.
questions.explanation: The classroom 是單數，過去式 be 動詞用 was。

questions.prompt: We ____ not ready for the quiz.
questions.explanation: We 是複數，過去式 be 動詞否定句用 were not。

questions.prompt: ____ you buy a new pencil yesterday?
questions.explanation: buy 是動作動詞，過去式問句用 Did。

questions.prompt: ____ you nervous before the test?
questions.explanation: nervous 是狀態，you 的過去式 be 動詞用 Were。

questions.prompt: Tom ____ not at the bus stop.
questions.explanation: Tom 是單數，過去式 be 動詞否定句用 was not。

questions.prompt: The children ____ in the yard yesterday.
questions.explanation: The children 是複數，過去式 be 動詞用 were。

questions.prompt: ____ the children run in the yard yesterday?
questions.explanation: run 是動作動詞，過去式問句要用 Did。

questions.prompt: My mom ____ not angry yesterday.
questions.explanation: My mom 是單數，過去式 be 動詞否定句用 was not。

questions.prompt: ____ your mom make dinner yesterday?
questions.explanation: make 是動作動詞，過去式問句用 Did。

questions.prompt: The test ____ difficult.
questions.explanation: The test 是單數，過去式 be 動詞用 was。

questions.prompt: ____ the test difficult?
questions.explanation: difficult 是狀態，the test 是單數，所以用 Was。

questions.prompt: ____ they visit their grandparents last weekend?
questions.explanation: visit 是動作動詞，過去式問句要用 Did。

questions.prompt: They ____ not at home last weekend.
questions.explanation: They 是複數，過去式 be 動詞否定句用 were not。

questions.prompt: The dog ____ not in the garden.
questions.explanation: The dog 是單數，過去式 be 動詞否定句用 was not。

questions.prompt: ____ the dog bark last night?
questions.explanation: bark 是動作動詞，過去式問句要用 Did。

questions.prompt: Our teacher ____ in the office after class.
questions.explanation: Our teacher 是單數，過去式 be 動詞用 was。

questions.prompt: ____ our teacher give us homework yesterday?
questions.explanation: give 是動作動詞，過去式問句用 Did。

questions.prompt: The girls ____ not afraid of the dark.
questions.explanation: The girls 是複數，過去式 be 動詞否定句用 were not。

questions.prompt: ____ the girls dance at the party?
questions.explanation: dance 是動作動詞，過去式問句要用 Did。

questions.prompt: ____ the girls excited at the party?
questions.explanation: excited 是狀態，the girls 是複數，所以用 Were。
